name: commit-commands
description: Codex-native commit and PR workflows with verified attribution.

interface.shortDescription: Commit and PR workflows with verified Codex attribution.
interface.longDescription: A native Codex adaptation of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin. It adds current-model and reasoning-effort attribution to new commits, can publish already committed branch work, uses a bundled wrapper to guarantee linked Codex attribution in GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise PR bodies, and preserves forceful clean_gone cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Create one commit for my current changes.
Commit my changes, push the branch, and open a pull request.
Force-clean local branches whose upstream is gone.
